title: A Thousand Cuts in Chrome
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A microchip smuggler with a memory-splicing implant discovers that the megacorp she steals from has been wiping and reselling the identities of death-row inmates as disposable workers — and that her own earliest memory is a brand she never bought.
long_description: A microchip smuggler with a memory-splicing implant discovers that the megacorp she steals from has been wiping and reselling the identities of death-row inmates as disposable workers — and that her own earliest memory is a brand she never bought.
main_characters: Dr. Yuki Han (a neuro-engineer at OmniGen)
